title: E3: Session-hints cache (.fabric/.cache/session-hints-{session_id}.json)
description: Add session-hints cache `.fabric/.cache/session-hints-{session_id}.json`. Keyed by (revision_hash, path). Tracks: hinted_paths (set of paths already emitted in this session), last_emitted_index_hash (sha256 of last emitted description_index subset). PreToolUse skips if path already hinted OR if matched-narrow index hash matches last emission. Cache invalidated wholesale when revision_hash changes (rc.5 C7 ensures pending changes don't invalidate spuriously). Cleanup: session-hints files older than 7 days deleted by doctor on next run. Anchor: handoff.json#acceptance_criteria for E3.

files.change: Read .fabric/.cache/session-hints-{session_id}.json before emit; skip if path in hinted_paths OR current index_hash == last_emitted_index_hash; on emit, update cache; on revision_hash change, drop cache wholesale
Add cleanup task that deletes session-hints-*.json files older than 7d (mtime check)

implementation: Define cache file shape: { session_id, revision_hash, hinted_paths: string[], last_emitted_index_hash: string }
In knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs: before emit, load session-hints-{session_id}.json if exists
If cache.revision_hash !== current revision_hash → treat as fresh (drop existing cache contents, will re-emit)
Otherwise check: if all input paths in cache.hinted_paths → skip emit (silent)
Compute current_index_hash = sha256(JSON.stringify(narrow.map(e => e.id))); if current_index_hash === cache.last_emitted_index_hash → skip emit
On emit: append paths to cache.hinted_paths; update cache.last_emitted_index_hash; write cache atomically (write to tmp + rename)
Add doctor cleanup pass: scan .fabric/.cache/session-hints-*.json; delete files with mtime older than 7 days
Unit tests: skip-when-already-hinted, skip-when-index-hash-matches, cache-invalidate-on-revision-change, cleanup-after-7d

reference.pattern: Per-session JSON cache + doctor cleanup pass

criteria: .fabric/.cache/session-hints-{session_id}.json maintained: hinted_paths set + last_emitted_index_hash, keyed by revision_hash
PreToolUse skips emit when path already hinted in current session
PreToolUse skips emit when matched narrow's index hash equals last_emitted_index_hash
Session-hints cache invalidated wholesale on revision_hash change
doctor cleans session-hints files older than 7 days

rationale.chosen_approach: Per-session JSON cache keyed by revision_hash; wholesale invalidation on hash change
decision_factors: Hook process is short-lived (no in-memory persistence)
Per-session granularity matches user mental model
rationale.tradeoffs: Cache files accumulate per session; mitigated by 7d cleanup

manual_checks: Simulate two Edit invocations on same path within same session → second one silent
Simulate Edit, then revision_hash change (approve a pending), then Edit on same path → second emit fires (cache invalidated)
Touch a session-hints file to >7d old; run fabric doctor; verify file deleted

risks.description: Atomic write fails on Windows fs.rename across volumes
